# Cirrus Capacity Tiers (2026 Refresh)

Cirrus continues to sell pooled capacity in C-tiers, from C2 up to C2048. This
is the 2026 snapshot that supersedes the 2025 Q3 note. Pricing is per capacity
unit per hour, billed whether or not the capacity is used.

## Questions Answered
- What is the current C-tier range and billing model?
- How does pooled capacity differ from per-workload consumption billing?

## Questions Raised
- Does pooled capacity still make sense for bursty agentic workloads?
